message:
test(e2e): update true E2E tests for new configuration structure

Updates the true E2E (end-to-end) test suite to work with the revised
configuration and test infrastructure:

config.rs:
- Updated test configuration loading
- New test environment setup helpers
- Improved cleanup between test runs

cargo_bench_tests.rs:
- Adjusted for new benchmark runner interface

cargo_nextest_tests.rs:
- Updated nextest integration test expectations

ssh_command_tests.rs:
- Fixed SSH command test assertions
- Updated expected output patterns

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
